Class AnahataAnnotationProvider

java.lang.Object
org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.BaseAnnotationProvider
org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.AnnotationProvider
uno.anahata.asi.nb.annotation.AnahataAnnotationProvider
public class AnahataAnnotationProvider extends org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.AnnotationProvider
Master Shell for Anahata context visibility in NetBeans.

This class is the IDE-facing 'Shell' that implements the AnnotationProvider API. It manages the high-salience NetBeans plumbing: 1. Global Re-entry Guard (BUSY): Prevents recursive annotation loops during delegation. 2. Manual Delegation Chain: Aggregates icons and names from other providers (Git, etc.) before overlaying Anahata's session indicators. 3. Position 10000: Ensures Anahata is the final aggregator in the chain.

All business logic (classification, resource counting, label building) is delegated to AnahataAnnotationLogic.

Author:
anahata

  • Field Details

    • LOG

      private static final Logger LOG
      Logger for tracking annotation lifecycle and delegation issues.

    • BUSY

      private static final ThreadLocal<Boolean> BUSY
      Global guard to prevent re-entry loops during the manual delegation chain. This is verified to prevent IDE 'flicker' and node lookup failures.

    • DELEGATING_ICON

      private static final ThreadLocal<Boolean> DELEGATING_ICON
      ThreadLocal guard to prevent recursion within the icon delegation logic.

    • DELEGATING_NAME

      private static final ThreadLocal<Boolean> DELEGATING_NAME
      ThreadLocal guard to prevent recursion within the HTML delegation logic.

    • BADGE

      private static final Image BADGE
      The scaled Anahata context badge (bell icon).

  • Constructor Details

    • AnahataAnnotationProvider

      public AnahataAnnotationProvider()
      Default constructor for the service loader. Initializes the provider and logs the startup message.

  • Method Details

    • annotateIcon

      public Image annotateIcon(Image icon, int type, Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)

      Implementation details: 1. Preserves existing badges (Git, Errors) by delegating to other providers. 2. Uses AnahataAnnotationLogic to classify the node and calculate session totals. 3. Overlays the Anahata bell icon if any of the files are in an active AI context. 4. Injects a dynamically built tooltip into the merged image.

      Specified by:
      annotateIcon in class org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.AnnotationProvider
      Parameters:
      icon - The base icon to annotate.
      type - The type of icon (e.g., closed/opened folder).
      files - The set of files represented by the node.
      Returns:
      The badged icon, or the original if no context is present.

    • annotateNameHtml

      public String annotateNameHtml(String name, Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)

      Implementation details: 1. Preserves existing HTML decorations (Git branch, status colors) via delegation. 2. Uses AnahataAnnotationLogic to determine the specific annotation suffix (bracketed counts or session names). 3. Surgically injects the suffix before the closing </html> tag.

      Specified by:
      annotateNameHtml in class org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.BaseAnnotationProvider
      Parameters:
      name - The original HTML name (may be null).
      files - The set of files represented by the node.
      Returns:
      The annotated HTML string.

    • actions

      public Action[] actions(Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)

      Implementation details: Returns a single AnahataContextActionPresenter which generates the dynamic "Add/Remove from AI Context" submenus. This allows all file types to be managed without specific MIME-type registrations.

      Overrides:
      actions in class org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.AnnotationProvider
      Parameters:
      files - The set of selected files.
      Returns:
      An array of actions to add to the context menu.

    • delegateIcon

      private Image delegateIcon(Image icon, int type, Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)
      Safely loops through other providers to aggregate their Icon results.

      Implementation details: Prevents infinite recursion by checking the DELEGATING_ICON guard. Iterates through all AnnotationProvider services except this one.

      Parameters:
      icon - The base icon to annotate.
      type - Icon type (BeanInfo).
      files - The set of target files.
      Returns:
      The aggregated and badged image.

    • delegateNameHtml

      private String delegateNameHtml(String name, Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)
      Safely loops through other providers to aggregate their HTML results.

      Implementation details: Prevents infinite recursion by checking the DELEGATING_NAME guard. Iterates through all AnnotationProvider services except this one.

      Parameters:
      name - The current HTML name.
      files - The set of target files.
      Returns:
      The aggregated HTML string.

    • annotateName

      public String annotateName(String name, Set<? extends org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)

      Implementation details: Not used. Anahata uses HTML-based name annotation for better styling and visibility of session context.

      Specified by:
      annotateName in class org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.BaseAnnotationProvider
      Parameters:
      name - Original name.
      files - Target files.
      Returns:
      null.

    • getInterceptionListener

      public org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.InterceptionListener getInterceptionListener()

      Implementation details: Not used by the Anahata provider as it delegates directly to standard NetBeans annotation hooks.

      Specified by:
      getInterceptionListener in class org.netbeans.modules.masterfs.providers.BaseAnnotationProvider
      Returns:
      null.

    • fireRefresh

      public static void fireRefresh(org.openide.filesystems.FileSystem fs, Set<org.openide.filesystems.FileObject> files)
      Fires a refresh event to redraw nodes for specific files across all AnnotationProviders.

      Implementation details: This method triggers a broad IDE status change to force a repaint of project views. It uses SwingUtilities.invokeLater(Runnable) to ensure the refresh happens in the next event cycle.

      Multi-FileSystem Support: If no specific filesystem is provided, the method gathers all filesystems currently involved in active projects and AI resources and broadcasts a broad invalidation pulse (using null set) to all of them. This is the authoritative way to handle nickname updates and resource removals.

      Parameters:
      fs - The filesystem of the target files (can be null for global pulse).
      files - The set of files requiring a redraw (can be null for global pulse).
